title: Merge Sorted Array
hints: Since both input arrays are already sorted, you can merge them efficiently by comparing elements from the end rather than the beginning.
Use three pointers: one for the last valid element of nums1, one for the last element of nums2, and one for the end of the merged array in nums1.
Compare the elements pointed to by the two source pointers and place the larger one at the current end position of nums1, then move the corresponding pointers backward.
